mapper.sql: id, task_id, version_no, env, version_status, publish_status, dag_json, dsl_json, input_schema_json, output_schema_json, test_status, test_execution_id, rollback_from_version_id, change_log, is_current, env_status, publish_time, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task_version (task_id, version_no, env, version_status, publish_status, dag_json, dsl_json, input_schema_json, output_schema_json, test_status, rollback_from_version_id, change_log, is_current, env_status, created_by) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{versionNo}, #{env}, #{versionStatus}, #{publishStatus}, #{dagJson}, #{dslJson}, #{inputSchemaJson}, #{outputSchemaJson}, #{testStatus}, #{rollbackFromVersionId}, #{changeLog}, #{isCurrent}, #{envStatus}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_current DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_current DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND is_current = 1 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_version WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task_version SET dag_json = #{dagJson}, dsl_json = #{dslJson}, input_schema_json = #{inputSchemaJson}, output_schema_json = #{outputSchemaJson} WHERE id = #{id} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE df_task_version SET version_status = #{versionStatus}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, change_log = #{changeLog}, publish_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE df_task_version SET is_current = 0 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND env = #{env} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE df_task_version SET is_current = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE df_task_version SET deleted = 1, is_current = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE df_task_version SET test_status = #{testStatus}, test_execution_id = #{testExecutionId} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
